conveyor-basic.name: Basic Conveyor
conveyor-basic.description: A simple conveyor belt that moves items in one direction.

conveyor-corner-left.name: Corner Conveyor (Left)
conveyor-corner-left.description: A conveyor belt that turns items 90 degrees.

conveyor-corner-right.name: Corner Conveyor (Right)
conveyor-corner-right.description: A conveyor belt that turns items 90 degrees.

conveyor-three-way.name: Three-way Conveyor
conveyor-three-way.description: A conveyor belt that merges two input lines into one output line.

conveyor-three-way-alternitive.name: Three-way Conveyor (Alternative)
conveyor-three-way-alternitive.description: A conveyor belt that merges two input lines into one output line, with an alternative layout.

conveyor-4way.name: 4-Way Conveyor
conveyor-4way.description: A conveyor belt that allows items from three input lines to merge into one output line.
